description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (UWP) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should have read-only repository permissions and use a Windows 2022 environment. It should then install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment for UWP, configure and build CMake for multiple build types and architectures (x64, x86, arm64) with both Debug and Release configurations, and clean up afterwards.
